profile.name: Aisha Khan
profile.headline: Early-Career Digital Marketing Analyst
profile.work_rights: UK Graduate visa holder; expiry not supplied

style_notes: Keep the CV concise and do not overstate internship ownership.

source_cv.summary: Early-career digital marketing graduate with internship experience supporting email and web campaigns and a university marketing-analytics capstone.

bullets: Supported email campaigns, landing-page updates and weekly performance reporting during a six-month internship.
Prepared campaign assets and coordinated feedback with the marketing coordinator.
Built a Google Sheets dashboard comparing channel spend, clicks and conversions for a university project.

education: Bachelor of Commerce (Marketing), Western Shore University, 2025

evidence.claim: Completed a six-month marketing internship supporting email and web campaigns.
evidence.safe_wording: Completed a six-month marketing internship supporting email and web campaigns.
evidence.source_excerpt: Six-month Digital Marketing Intern placement supporting email campaigns, landing pages and weekly reporting.
restrictions: Do not describe internship work as campaign ownership.

evidence.claim: Built a campaign dashboard in Google Sheets for a university project.
evidence.safe_wording: Built a campaign-performance dashboard in Google Sheets for a university project.
evidence.source_excerpt: University capstone: built a Google Sheets dashboard to compare channel spend, clicks and conversions.
restrictions: Keep this labelled as a university project.
Do not infer Power BI expertise.

evidence.claim: Completed a Bachelor of Commerce in Marketing.
evidence.source_excerpt: Bachelor of Commerce (Marketing), Western Shore University, 2025.

expected_journey: Ask about visa expiry only when a role makes ongoing work rights material; create a concise one-page CV without inflating internship ownership.
